title: Verification, Scoring, and Codification
objective: Finalize the evaluation system, build a self-test suite, create regression benchmarks, and codify the evolved methodology into its final v3.0 form.
storyQuestions: Can the 6 metrics be extended with cognitive load index, genre fidelity score, integration completeness?
What is the minimum test suite size that catches 95% of quality regressions?
Can the scoring system self-calibrate based on accumulated autopsy data?
Is the final methodology stable under adversarial attack?
baseAcceptanceChecks: 9+ computable quality metrics (original 6 + at least 3 new)
Regression test suite with 5+ test scenes and golden storyboards
SKILL.md and QUICKREF.md updated to reflect all v3.0 changes
sb-evomap.md updated to v3.0 with complete version history
